import openpyxl
wb = openpyxl.load_workbook\('DPMB - tramvaje.xlsx'\)

for sheet_name in wb.sheetnames[1:]:
    ws = wb[sheet_name]
    print\(f'=== {sheet_name} ==='\)
    for row in ws.iter_rows\(values_only=True\):
        if any\(cell is not None for cell in row\):
            print\(row\)
    print\(\)
")
